name: SegmentedControl
description: A linear set of two or more segments
searchText: segmentedcontrol a linear set of two or more segments @mantine/core /core/segmented-control autocontrast color data defaultvalue disabled fullwidth name onchange orientation radius readonly size transitionduration transitiontimingfunction value withitemsborders

props.name: autoContrast
props.description: If set, automatically adjusts label text color for optimal contrast against the indicator background color

props.name: color
props.description: Key of theme.colors or any valid CSS color, changes indicator background color. By default, uses white in light mode and dark.5 in dark mode

props.name: data
props.description: Data based on which controls are rendered

props.name: disabled
props.description: Determines whether the component is disabled

props.name: fullWidth
props.description: Determines whether the component should take 100% width of its parent

props.name: name
props.description: Name attribute for the radio group. A random name is auto-generated if not provided

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius, numbers are converted to rem

props.name: readOnly
props.description: If set to false, prevents changing the value

props.name: transitionDuration
props.description: Indicator transition-duration in ms, set 0 to turn off transitions

props.name: withItemsBorders
props.description: Determines whether there should be borders between items
